description: Verso: Draft of a legal document in the hand of Shelomo b. Eliyyahu. Location: Fustat. Dated: Tuesday, 23 Adar II 1540 = 20 March 1229 CE. In which al-Shaykh al-Nafīs Abū Isḥāq Avraham b. Ḥananya known as Ibn al-Dayyan leases half of a house with a garden (known as Dār al-Bustān) to Abū l-Rabīʿ Sulaymān aka Shelomo Segan ha-Kohanim b. Abū l-ʿAlāʾ Meshullam ha-Kohen Kelil ha-Yofi Ibn al-Istibānī. (There was a merchant known as Meshullam b. Elʿazar ha-Kohen Kelil ha-Yofi active ca. 1200 but it's not clear if this is the same person.) The lease is for two years. It seems that the monthly rent is 25 dirhams but the tenant retains 5 dirhams monthly in exchange for watering and taking care of the garden. Starting in l. 24 the substance of the deed is repeated in Aramaic instead of Judaeo-Arabic.
description_he: טיוטת מסמך משפטי בכתב יד שלמה בן אליהו, 20 במרץ 1229. שכירת חצי בית עם גינה לשנתיים.
